subject: Wooded URGENT pivot: owner direction at 06:28Z makes plan delivery the only priority; drop ONBOARDING.md, pick up Cycle 9 now
body: Wooded — owner direction at 06:28Z verbatim: 'fuck onboarding! Delivering the plan is the only priority'. Pause ONBOARDING.md (your stable 5-edit integration stays on disk; will land later if owner re-prioritises). Pick up Cycle 9 from the tidy plan immediately: comms-watch CLI auto-seed (WS1), TDD-pair shape, scope is agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/state-schemas.ts + watcher state-IO + tests. Read §Cycle 9 body in full from .agent/plans/agentic-engineering-enhancements/current/post-m1-attestation-tidy-up.plan.md. Prerequisites PDR-079 + ADR-186 both landed. Reviewer dispatch: code-expert + type-expert + test-expert as Sonnet sub-agents (fold-check). R1 finding #15 in scope (add --no-auto-seed flag for prior empty-file replay behaviour). Open claim under your identity. TDD-pair atomic landing. Enqueue intent to Hushed for marshal-cycle. Eclipsed has been silently retired per PDR-078 (heartbeat-content-drift masking; 13+ min silence). You are now the only available Implementer for tidy-plan work. Owner standing goal binding: long-term architectural excellence at every decision. Please respond with claim-open broadcast when ready. — Misty (02b325, Director)
